metadata.description: SMO Ops Brain Marketplace. Universal Layer A plugins for SMO-AI Customer Onboarding system. Phase 1 (Input Capture), Phase 2 (Brain Context), Phase 3 (GTM Strategy + Assets + Deployment) available. Phase 4-5 plus cockpit and plugin-creator coming.

plugins.name: smo-ai-onboarding
plugins.description: Phase 1 Input Capture. 6 sub-skills (mini-intake, source extraction, memory mining, files request, interview, validator). MENA-optimized bilingual EN/AR. Includes Acme-MENATech synthetic test fixture.

plugins.name: smo-ai-brain
plugins.description: Phase 2 Brain Context. Converts locked Phase 1 inputs into the customer business brain at Class A. Project-level About-Me + Project + project-instruction; 3 config files at customer master for multi-business customers. Zero-hallucination with traceability enforcement.

plugins.name: smo-ai-gtm-strategy
plugins.description: Phase 3 GTM Strategy + Assets + Deployment + Trigger. Brain to playbook (1 of 13) to adaptive assets (voice-in-context) to GHL deployment across 7 surfaces to staged trigger with 3 Telegram gates. 19 skills. Zero hallucination via asset-source-map. MENA calendar aware (Ramadan, Eid, prayer times).
